title: rubus × rixosus
intro: Rubus × rixosus, also known as the raspberry-lemon hybrid, is a cross between Rubus idaeus (wild raspberry) and Rubus fruticosus (black raspberry). This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to act as an astringent and anti-inflammatory agent. The health benefits of Rubus × rixosus include its potential to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate digestive issues. Herbal preparations of Rubus × rixosus can be made into teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
